---
title: "Dennis Chumakov"
subtitle: "Business · Data · Analytics"
image: images/DennisChumakov_Headshot.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dennischumakov/
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/dennis-chumakov
      target: _blank
title-block-style: none
---

---

I'm a dual-degree business student finishing up at **Dublin City University** 
and **Brock University**, with a focus on data analytics, workflow automation, 
and applied problem-solving.

From machine learning models to building a startup from the ground up, 
this portfolio captures the work and experiences that have defined my 
time in college.

When I'm not buried in work, I'm usually travelling somewhere new and taking photos.

---

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .card .text-center .p-4}
### 🎓 Education
Dual degree across **Ireland** and **Canada**, combining Global Business 
with Business Administration.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .card .text-center .p-4}
### 📊 Skills
Python · Quarto · Git · Data Analysis · Machine Learning · SCSS
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .card .text-center .p-4}
### 📷 Beyond the Desk
Traveller and photographer, always looking for the next shot.
:::

::::
